name: marketing agencies managing 5–15 clients/month tool
description: For marketing agencies managing 5–15 clients/month, inaccurate budget forecasting causes overspending. We provide automated budget forecasting instead of manual spreadsheets and ad-hoc calculations.
problem_solved: Inaccurate budget forecasting leads to overspending and missed opportunities for cost savings.
